contract_summary: This function acquires an additional reference on the amdgpu_userq_fence_driver object by unconditionally incrementing its kref refcount. The caller already holds a pointer to the object and now owns an extra reference that must be released via a corresponding kref_put (or wrapper) when the caller no longer needs the reference. There is no return value to check and no error path; the function is safe to call as long as the object pointer is valid.
